top.name: Arc Bolt
top.rules_text: Deal 5 damage. Damage arcs through Sympathy Links: if target is within range 2 of a linked construct deal 2 bonus damage.

channel.name: Arc Bolt (Channel)
channel.rules_text: Channel: Arc hits all enemies adjacent to the construct too

bottom.name: Kinetic Plate
bottom.rules_text: Gain 4 armor. If you have a Sympathy Link active gain 4 shield as well.

channel.name: Kinetic Plate (Channel)
channel.rules_text: Channel: Also gain 2 armor per construct on the board
